parameters.jsCode: const fp=$('Master Process').first().json;const feedRows=fp.allRows.filter(r=>r.ContentType!=='story');const prodNames=feedRows.map(r=>r.ProductName||r.Topic).filter(Boolean);const today=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];let prods=[];try{prods=$('Read Products').all().map(i=>i.json).filter(p=>p.Status==='Active'||p.Status==='Seasonal')}catch(e){}const updates=[];prods.forEach(p=>{if(prodNames.some(n=>n.toLowerCase().includes((p.Name||'').toLowerCase())||((p.Name||'').toLowerCase().includes(n.toLowerCase())))){updates.push({json:{ProductID:p.ProductID,LastFeaturedDate:today}})}});return updates.length?updates:[{json:{skip:true}}];

parameters.subject: =Alert🚨!!!!!
parameters.message: 🚨 *AI Generation FAILED* - Templates used. ALL posts need manual review. Check calendar.
